text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shortly after the Takarazuka Kinen, summer camp
arrives. On the surface, everything appears
business as usual with Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her expression occasionally darkens,
and her depression is too much to hide.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I really want to help. Symboli Rudolf, who has
also noticed something is amiss, encourages me
to support Air Groove to the best of my ability.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Symboli Rudolf behind me, I work toward
giving Air Groove a comeback and restoring her
confidence at the Sapporo Kinen.
